name: cxone
description: CXone integration nodes for Cognigy.AI — authentication, Signal API, Knowledge Hub, scripts, and rich content

scripts.build: npm run transpile && npm run lint && npm run zip
scripts.zip: tar cfz $npm_package_name-$npm_package_version.tar.gz build/* package.json README.md icon.png
